overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European-style city at night. The character navigates narrow cobblestone streets lit by torchlight, visits a waterfront viewpoint, and explores the atmospheric historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval market street with wooden scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone street holding a torch, following a group of townspeople

notable_agents.action: group of three townspeople walking ahead carrying torches

entered.detail: rough timber construction scaffolding attached to the stone building facade
tan canvas awning over a wooden market stall with barrels underneath
medieval building with stone ground floor and timber-framed upper stories
irregular cobblestone paving stones forming the narrow street surface

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval street lined with stone and timber buildings. Wooden scaffolding covers the right side of the street while a market stall with a canvas canopy sits on the left. The cobblestone path is illuminated by torchlight as the character follows a small group of NPCs ahead.

events.description: ascends stone steps from the narrow enclosed street to the open viewpoint
stops at the stone railing to look out over the water, then turns around to descend

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps to reach the viewpoint, pausing to look at the scenic water view before turning back

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing stationary by the railing holding a torch

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade with decorative finials overlooking the water
dark body of water visible below the terrace edge
dark cloudy night sky visible overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as Geralt ascends to a waterfront viewpoint. A stone railing with decorative elements borders the terrace overlooking dark water. An armored guard stands watch by the railing. The night sky is visible overhead as the character pauses to take in the view before turning back.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street passing through stone archways

events.description: passes through a small stone archway into a wider market area

agents.ego_description: descending from the viewpoint and continuing through the town streets, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: townsman in red vest and hat walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden wagon with spoked wheels parked against the building wall
narrow stone tunnel connecting different sections of the street
large decorative stone archway leading to the open waterfront

segments.scene_description: Geralt returns to the narrow cobblestone streets, descending from the viewpoint. The character passes a wooden cart and walks through a small stone archway. The street opens slightly into a market area with hanging banners, approaching a large decorative archway that leads toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with burning braziers

events.description: exits through the large stone archway onto the open waterfront terrace
stops at the curved railing to look out at the distant harbor lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, pausing to admire the view of the distant harbor lights

entered.detail: wide curved cobblestone terrace with stone railings overlooking the harbor
large stone fire bowls burning brightly along the terrace railing
faint warm lights from buildings visible across the dark water

segments.scene_description: Passing through the large archway, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront terrace. The curved stone railing is lined with burning torch braziers casting warm light on the cobblestones. Geralt walks along the edge, stopping to look out at the distant harbor lights across the dark water before continuing along the promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path approaching the archway entrance

events.description: turns around from the waterfront view and walks back toward the archway

agents.ego_description: turning back from the waterfront and walking toward the stone archway to re-enter the city streets

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns away from the waterfront view and walks back along the terrace. The large stone archway looms ahead as the character approaches the entrance to return to the enclosed city streets. The torch braziers recede into the distance as the scene transitions back toward the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense medieval city that expands from narrow, torchlit alleys into a wide, open waterfront promenade. It begins with Geralt navigating a tight cobblestone street lined with timber buildings and wooden scaffolding, following a group of NPCs past a canvas market stall. As the path ascends, the scene opens onto a stone terrace where an armored guard stands watch over dark waters under a night sky, before the camera descends back through a stone archway and past hanging banners. The view then expands further as Geralt passes through a large decorative archway onto a wide waterfront terrace illuminated by burning torch braziers. Finally, the camera turns away from the distant harbor lights, receding along the curved stone railing as the character heads back toward the looming archway and the enclosed city streets.
